Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/AI_Business_Resources.asp

# SBDC AI Business Resources Hub

## Resource type
AI adoption and education resource hub.

## Best for
Small businesses wanting to use AI for operations, marketing, productivity, decision support, customer service, finance, HR, and growth.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stages
Launch, Operations, Growth, Recovery; also useful in Ideation/Validation for lean learning.

## Use when the entrepreneur says
"How can I use AI in my business?" "Can AI help me market?" "I need to save time," "I want to automate."

## Resource summary
The AI resources page includes AI FAQs for advising, a Small Business AI Resource Guide, AI webinars, in-person AI classes, a Quick Start Guide, and guidance on how small businesses can use AI.

## What the user can do with this resource
Open the hub, choose AI FAQs/resource guide/classes/webinars, and pair with advisor/specialist support if needed.

## BOSS routing notes
Use this as an education resource, not a replacement for business-model validation or data/privacy review.

## Related source URLs
- https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/webinars.asp

## BOSS Library use notes
- Treat this as a resource-routing document, not as legal, tax, lending, certification, or procurement advice.
- Use the linked source URL as the user-facing official link.
- Ask discovery questions before routing when the user is early-stage or unclear.
- For Houston/77084 users, verify county/service-area fit through the official SBDC/SBA locator before giving a final local-office referral.
